title: Artificial Ambassadors: The Three Cases for Sending LLMs to Deep Space
summary: Artificial Ambassadors: The Three Cases for Sending LLMs to Deep Space
whyItMatters: For something that “simply predicts the next token”, Large Language Models are a surprisingly versatile technology. In addition to the obvious applications, such as chatbots, translation engines or coding assistants, LLMs can act as agents, operating various software and hardware tools.
